summary: Session 17 Part 1 testing complete. ALL FEATURES PASSED: (1) Jest suite 138/138 tests passing (+8 vercel_deploy tests), (2) POST /projects/:id/deploy/vercel route verified via Jest: returns correct response shape {success, url, deployment_id, status}, files sent include package.json, vite.config.js, index.html, src/main.jsx + generated files, all base64-encoded, projectSettings.framework='vite', (3) Error paths verified: 401 unauthenticated, 400 missing token, 404 no files, surfaces Vercel API error message, (4) saveToken=true persists token via db.projects.update, saveToken=false does NOT persist, (5) Project name sanitization: 'Cool App!! 2026' becomes 'cool-app-2026', (6) Frontend DeployTab UI verified: Vercel card present, token input field, 'Remember token for this project' checkbox (data-testid='deploy-vercel-save-token'), deploy button (data-testid='deploy-vercel-go-btn'), Download ZIP, Netlify card, Deployment History section, (7) Dashboard loads, no critical console errors, Backend button works.
critical_code_review_comments: PASS: Jest suite 138/138 tests passing across 11 test files (+8 new vercel_deploy tests)
PASS: POST /projects/:id/deploy/vercel returns {success, url, deployment_id, status} response shape
PASS: Vercel API called with framework='vite', buildCommand='npm run build', outputDirectory='dist'
PASS: Files sent to Vercel include package.json, vite.config.js, index.html, src/main.jsx, src/App.jsx, src/components/*
PASS: All files are base64-encoded with encoding='base64' field
PASS: 401 returned when unauthenticated
PASS: 400 returned when token is missing
PASS: 404 returned when project has no files
PASS: Vercel API error message surfaced correctly (403 Forbidden test)
PASS: saveToken=true calls db.projects.update with settings.vercel.token
PASS: saveToken=false (default) does NOT call db.projects.update
PASS: Project name sanitization: 'Cool App!! 2026' -> 'cool-app-2026'
PASS: DeployTab has data-testid='deploy-vercel-card'
PASS: DeployTab has data-testid='deploy-vercel-setup-btn'
PASS: DeployTab has data-testid='deploy-vercel-token-input'
PASS: DeployTab has data-testid='deploy-vercel-save-token' checkbox
PASS: DeployTab has data-testid='deploy-vercel-go-btn' deploy button
PASS: DeployTab has data-testid='deploy-download-zip'
PASS: DeployTab has data-testid='deploy-netlify-card'
PASS: Deployment History section shows 'No deployments yet'
PASS: Dashboard loads with projects visible
PASS: No critical console errors
context_for_next_testing_agent: Session 17 Part 1 complete. Vercel deploy route upgraded to use buildVercelReadyFileMap with Vite+React+Tailwind scaffold, framework='vite', base64-encoded files. 8 new Jest tests added for deploy route covering happy path, error paths, saveToken persistence, and name sanitization. DeployTab UI has new 'Remember token for this project' checkbox. Jest suite now at 138/138 tests across 11 test files. Vercel API is MOCKED in tests - no real deployments made.

mocked_apis.vercel_api: Vercel v13 /deployments API is MOCKED in test_vercel_deploy.test.js via jest.fn(). No real Vercel deployments are made during testing.
